member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SpecialCharRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the SpecialCharRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SpecialCharRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SpecialCharRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SpecialCharRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SpecialCharRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SpecialCharRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SpecialCharRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.SpecialCharRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_ascii_40FF03FEFFFF87FEFFFF07
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in ".0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz".

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.ConstructedCardModel.WithBlock(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a BlockVar with given base value.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.ConstructedCardModel.WithDamage(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a DamageVar with given base value.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.ConstructedCardModel.WithCards(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a CardsVar with given base value.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.ConstructedCardModel.WithPower``1(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a PowerVar and adds a tooltip. You can also just pass a PowerVar to WithVars.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.ConstructedCardModel.WithPower``1(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a PowerVar with the specified name and adds a tooltip. You can also just pass a PowerVar to WithVars.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.ConstructedCardModel.WithCalculatedVar(System.String,System.Int32,System.Func{MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Creatures.Creature,System.Decimal})
member.summary: Variable value is baseVal + bonus

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.ConstructedCardModel.WithCalculatedVar(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Func{MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Creatures.Creature,System.Decimal})
member.summary: Variable value is baseVal + (multVal * mult)

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.ConstructedCardModel.WithCalculatedBlock(System.Int32,System.Func{MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Creatures.Creature,System.Decimal},MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.ValueProps.ValueProp)
member.summary: Resulting variable name is "CalculatedBlock" Variable value is baseVal + bonus

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.ConstructedCardModel.WithCalculatedBlock(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Func{MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Creatures.Creature,System.Decimal},MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.ValueProps.ValueProp)
member.summary: Resulting variable name is "CalculatedBlock" Variable value is baseVal + (multVal * mult)

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.ConstructedCardModel.WithCalculatedDamage(System.Int32,System.Func{MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Creatures.Creature,System.Decimal},MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.ValueProps.ValueProp)
member.summary: Resulting variable name is "CalculatedDamage" Variable value is baseVal + bonus

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.ConstructedCardModel.WithCalculatedDamage(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Func{MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Creatures.Creature,System.Decimal},MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.ValueProps.ValueProp)
member.summary: Resulting variable name is "CalculatedDamage" Variable value is baseVal + (multVal * mult)

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.ConstructedCardModel.WithTip(BaseLib.Utils.TooltipSource)
member.summary: Can accept PowerModel, CardKeyword, CardModel, PotionModel

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomAncientModel.IsValidForAct(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.ActModel)
member.summary:
Suggested to check act.ActNumber == 2 or 3.
If you are overriding ShouldForceSpawn, you should override this and return false.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomAncientModel.ShouldForceSpawn(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.ActModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.AncientEventModel)
member.summary: Suggested to leave this set to false unless you want to force a specific ancient to spawn during map generation. Messing with this can cause mod conflicts, please only use if it is 100% necessary for your mod to function.
member.param: The ancient that will have been chosen by the games rng.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomAncientModel.GetAssetPaths(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Runs.IRunState)
member.summary: Override to load custom event scene.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomAncientModel.CustomScenePath
member.summary: Path to a custom event scene which will be the background of the event.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCardModel.GainsBlock
member.summary: For convenience; can be manually overridden if necessary.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCardPoolModel.CustomFrame(BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCardModel)
member.summary: Back image of a card. Not required; basegame cards all use the same frames, colored using a shader. Ancient rarity uses a separate frame that ignores this logic.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCardPoolModel.CardFrameMaterialPath
member.summary: Material is a shader material that will be applied to the frame texture. A custom frame can be used by overriding . Override this only if you have a custom shadermaterial. If not overridden, a custom material will be automatically defined using .

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCardPoolModel.ShaderColor
member.summary: Used for HSV values of material shader. HSV can instead be overridden directly.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCardPoolModel.EnergyColorName
member.summary: Override this to load a custom tres from `images/atlases/ui_atlas.sprites/card/energy_{EnergyColorName}.tres` Otherwise, override BigEnergyIconPath and TextEnergyIconPath.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCardPoolModel.BigEnergyIconPath
member.summary: Override and provide a .tres or .png or similar

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCharacterModel.CustomVisualPath
member.summary: Override this or place your scene at res://scenes/creature_visuals/class_name.tscn

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCharacterModel.CustomIconPath
member.summary: Path to a scene for top left in-run icon and compendium pool filter

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCharacterModel.CustomIcon
member.summary: Generate icon for in-run top left and compendium pool filter. Takes precedence over CustomIconPath.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCharacterModel.CustomEnergyCounter
member.summary: Legacy simple energy counter API. Prefer CustomEnergyCounterPath.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCharacterModel.CustomEnergyCounterPath
member.summary: A pure Godot scene that BaseLib will convert into a usable NEnergyCounter at runtime. Standard Godot nodes such as Control, Label, TextureRect, Node2D, and GpuParticles2D will be converted as necessary.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCharacterModel.CustomCharacterSelectBg
member.summary: Override this or place your scene at res://scenes/screens/char_select/char_select_bg_class_name.tscn

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCharacterModel.CreateCustomVisuals
member.summary: By default, will convert a scene containing the necessary nodes into a NCreatureVisuals even if it is not one.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCharacterModel.SetupCustomAnimationStates(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Bindings.MegaSpine.MegaSprite)
member.summary: Override and return a CreatureAnimator if you need to set up states that differ from the default for your character. Using is suggested.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomCharacterModel.SetupAnimationState(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Bindings.MegaSpine.MegaSprite,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: If you have a spine animation without all the required animations, use this method to set up a controller that will use animations of your choice for each animation. Any omitted animation parameters will default to the idle animation.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomOrbModel.IncludeInRandomPool
member.summary: Set to true to include this orb in the random orb pool (e.g. Chaos).

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomOrbModel.CreateCustomSprite
member.summary: Override to create a custom sprite for this orb. If null is returned, falls back to CustomSpritePath or the default sprite.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomPile
member.summary: Patches for functionality found here

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomPile.#ctor(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Cards.PileType)
member.summary: Define a PileType CustomEnum inside your CustomPile class and use it as the parameter for this constructor.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomPile.CardShouldBeVisible(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel)
member.summary: For a CardPile like the hand, where cards are directly shown. This does not handle keeping the NCards visible; it just says that they should be. Changes how cards are moved between piles.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomPile.NeedsCustomTransitionVisual
member.summary: For something like the exhaust pile where cards have an exhaust effect applied rather than using the normal card pile transition. Will be ignored if CardsVisible is true due to the necessity of allowing an NCard to be created.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomPile.CustomTween(Godot.Tween,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Nodes.Cards.NCard,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Cards.CardPile)
member.summary: Create a custom tween when a card is moved to this pile. Return true if a custom tween is created. Otherwise default tween used to move to discard/draw with GetTargetPosition will be used.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomPotionPoolModel.IsShared
member.summary: You shouldn't need this (just use SharedRelicPool), but it is allowed.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomPowerModel
member.summary: Your power can either inherit CustomPowerModel directly, or a different power class and ICustomPowerModel. This class exists mainly to avoid needing to inherit multiple classes for most powers.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Abstracts.CustomRelicPoolModel.IsShared
member.summary: You shouldn't need this (just use SharedRelicPool), but it is allowed.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Abstracts.ICustomModel
member.summary: Checked in PrefixIdPatch to determine if a prefix should be added.

member.name: T:BaseLib.BaseLibScenes.NLogWindow.MethodName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the methods contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.summary: Get the method information for all the methods declared in this class. This method is used by Godot to register the available methods in the editor. Do not call this method.

member.name: M:BaseLib.BaseLibScenes.NLogWindow.GetGodotPropertyList
member.summary: Get the property information for all the properties declared in this class. This method is used by Godot to register the available properties in the editor. Do not call this method.

member.name: T:BaseLib.BaseLibScenes.NLogWindow.SignalName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the signals contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Config.ConfigSectionAttribute
member.summary: Creates a new section in the ModConfig UI, where the next property will be the first entry after the section header.
member.param: The LocString name. Will be transformed just like property names, so for "FirstSection", you need to specify a value for YOURMOD-FIRST_SECTION.title in the localization file(s).

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.ConfigSectionAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new section in the ModConfig UI, where the next property will be the first entry after the section header.
member.param: The LocString name. Will be transformed just like property names, so for "FirstSection", you need to specify a value for YOURMOD-FIRST_SECTION.title in the localization file(s).

member.name: T:BaseLib.Config.SliderRangeAttribute
member.summary: Specifies a range and step for a slider. Negative numbers are supported, as are noninteger numbers.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Config.SliderLabelFormatAttribute
member.summary: The string format to us for the slider's label. Uses standard C# format, see .

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.SliderLabelFormatAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: The string format to us for the slider's label. Uses standard C# format, see .

member.name: T:BaseLib.Config.ConfigHoverTipAttribute
member.summary:
Show a tooltip for this setting on hover. Requires a settings_ui.json localization file. The names used are typically: YOURMOD-PROPERTY_NAME.hover.title (optional, if missing, no title will be shown)
YOURMOD-PROPERTY_NAME.hover.desc (required)
member.param: Enable hover tip for this property. Can be set to false in order to add exceptions for

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.ConfigHoverTipAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Show a tooltip for this setting on hover. Requires a settings_ui.json localization file. The names used are typically: YOURMOD-PROPERTY_NAME.hover.title (optional, if missing, no title will be shown)
YOURMOD-PROPERTY_NAME.hover.desc (required)
member.param: Enable hover tip for this property. Can be set to false in order to add exceptions for

member.name: T:BaseLib.Config.HoverTipsByDefaultAttribute
member.summary: Attempt to add hover tips to ALL config properties in this class. Use with enabled=false to add exceptions. Still requires .hover.desc entries in your localization file, see .

member.name: T:BaseLib.Config.ConfigIgnoreAttribute
member.summary:
Completely ignores this property. It will not be loaded or saved, and will not be shown for auto-generated UI.
Intended for properties that aren't configuration options at all.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Config.ConfigHideInUI
member.summary:
Saves and loads this property to the config file normally, but generate no UI for it in SimpleModConfig.
Intended for when you want to create the UI manually, or easily persist things that aren't user-configurable (e.g. total gold gained / number of runs played with the mod active).

member.name: T:BaseLib.Config.TextInputPreset
member.summary: Defines a set of allowed characters for a LineEdit.

member.name: F:BaseLib.Config.TextInputPreset.Anything
member.summary: The default. No validation at all.

member.name: F:BaseLib.Config.TextInputPreset.Alphanumeric
member.summary: English letters and numbers (a-z, A-Z, 0-9).

member.name: F:BaseLib.Config.TextInputPreset.AlphanumericWithSpaces
member.summary: English letters, numbers (a-z, A-Z, 0-9) and spaces.

member.name: F:BaseLib.Config.TextInputPreset.SafeDisplayName
member.summary: Allows international letters, numbers, spaces, underscores, and hyphens.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Config.ConfigTextInputAttribute
member.summary:
Defines the allowed characters and max length for the LineEdit generated by a string property.
You can specify a or a custom Regex string for the allowed characters. By default, any string is allowed, at any length. If a placeholder LocString exists (YOURMOD-PROPERTY_NAME.placeholder), it will be used; if you don't want a placeholder, simply skip creating such a string.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Config.ConfigButtonAttribute
member.summary:
Creates a clickable button from a method. Source code order is respected, so if the method is defined in between two properties, the button will be in between their respective controls.
The method supports having any of these different arguments injected with any name, in any order (only the type is used):
ModConfig: Injects the instance of your ModConfig (may be useful if the method is static).
NConfigButton: Injects the instance of the button that was clicked.
NConfigOptionRow: Injects the instance of the row the button belongs to (the node that handles its layout, hover tip, etc.).
member.param: LocString key for the text on the button.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.ConfigButtonAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary:
Creates a clickable button from a method. Source code order is respected, so if the method is defined in between two properties, the button will be in between their respective controls.
The method supports having any of these different arguments injected with any name, in any order (only the type is used):
ModConfig: Injects the instance of your ModConfig (may be useful if the method is static).
NConfigButton: Injects the instance of the button that was clicked.
NConfigOptionRow: Injects the instance of the row the button belongs to (the node that handles its layout, hover tip, etc.).
member.param: LocString key for the text on the button.

member.name: E:BaseLib.Config.ModConfig.ConfigChanged
member.summary: Event that fires when is called. Custom controls must call Changed() when mutating a property.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.ModConfig.ModConfigLogger.Warn(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Show a message in the console, and optionally in the GUI. Only use showInGui=true if truly necessary; players won't enjoy having warnings/errors shoved in their faces unless it's something that truly impacts them.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.ModConfig.Load``1
member.summary: Static helper to reload your mod's config, for when you don't have easy access to the instance.

summary.para: Save after ms, unless SaveDebounced was called again during the delay, in which case the old request is canceled and the new one replaces it.
Note that you ONLY ever need to call this if you yourself modify the properties at runtime. BaseLib will always save when the user changes something in the settings screen.
Save after ms, unless SaveDebounced was called again during the delay, in which case the old request is canceled and the new one replaces it.
Note that you ONLY ever need to call this if you yourself modify the properties at runtime. BaseLib will always save when the user changes something in the settings screen.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.ModConfig.Save
member.summary:
Immediately save the current configuration to disk. Prefer using (on the instance or its static variant) instead unless you absolutely must save *now*. Indeed, using SaveDebounced(0) is likely still better than calling this directly.
Using both is not recommended and may cause issues with locking/hangs.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.ModConfig.CreateRawTickboxControl(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary:
Creates a raw control, with no layout (label, margins), no automatic hover tip, etc.
Use the Create*Option methods instead unless you need a custom layout (or use them, and customize them).
member.param: The property this control is bound to. Fetch with e.g. GetType().GetProperty() in a ModConfig.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.ModConfig.CreateRawButtonControl(System.String,System.Action)
member.summary: Creates a raw button control. You may want instead.
member.param: The text to place on the button
Action to perform when the user clicks/presses the button.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.ModConfig.SpecialCharRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
[^a-zA-Z0-9_.]
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [^.0-9A-Z_a-z].

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.SimpleModConfig.SetupConfigUI(Godot.Control)
member.summary: Auto-generate a UI from the properties used. Should be enough for the vast majority of mods, but you can also subclass SimpleModConfig and override this to get access to helpers like (in addition to the raw Create*Control methods from ModConfig), without an auto-generated UI.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.SimpleModConfig.CreateButton(System.String,System.String,System.Action,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a button that can be mapped to perform any action.
member.param: LocString key for the row label (shown where setting names are shown).
LocString key for the button's label text.
Action to perform when clicked/pressed.
If true, generates a localized hover tip; the localization key name is based on rowLabelKey.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.SimpleModConfig.CreateSectionHeader(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a layout-ready section header row.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.SimpleModConfig.CreateStandardOption(System.Func{System.Reflection.PropertyInfo,Godot.Control},System.Reflection.PropertyInfo,System.Boolean)

summary.para: Creates a standard configuration row containing a label and an option control. It has default margins and optionally a hover tip (see for requirements).
You likely only need to call this if you create a custom control and want to use the default font/margin settings for it.

member.param: The property this option represents.
If true, automatically attaches a localized tooltip.
member.returns: A fully configured , ready to insert with AddChild.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.SimpleModConfig.GenerateOptionFromProperty(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary:
Auto-generates a UI row from a property, including a hover tip if [ConfigHoverTip] is specified.
Properties with [ConfigHideinUI] will NOT be ignored, so you can use this to manually create them if you wish.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.SimpleModConfig.GenerateButtonRowFromMethod(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary:
Auto-generates a button row from a method marked with [ConfigButton], including a hover tip if [ConfigHoverTip] is specified.
Methods with [ConfigHideinUI] will NOT be ignored, so you can use this to manually create buttons for them if you wish.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.SimpleModConfig.GenerateOptionsForAllProperties(Godot.Control)
member.summary:
Auto-generate option rows for all properties in this SimpleModConfig. Runs by default, so that a subclass only needs to add its config properties, and nothing more, to get a reasonable UI. Properties marked with [ConfigHideInUI] will be ignored. Properties marked with [ConfigIgnore] won't even make it to this method.
Methods marked with [ConfigButton] will generate buttons.
member.param: Container where the generated options are inserted.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.UI.NConfigButton.SetColor(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the color using an HSV shader.
member.param: Hue, range 0-1
Saturation, 0-1 or higher for boosted saturation
Value, range 0-1

member.name: T:BaseLib.Config.UI.NConfigButton.MethodName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the methods contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: F:BaseLib.Config.UI.NConfigButton.MethodName.SetColor
member.summary: Cached name for the 'SetColor' method.

member.name: F:BaseLib.Config.UI.NConfigButton.MethodName._Ready
member.summary: Cached name for the '_Ready' method.

member.name: F:BaseLib.Config.UI.NConfigButton.MethodName._GuiInput
member.summary: Cached name for the '_GuiInput' method.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.UI.NConfigButton.GetGodotMethodList
member.summary: Get the method information for all the methods declared in this class. This method is used by Godot to register the available methods in the editor. Do not call this method.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Config.UI.NConfigButton.PropertyName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the properties and fields contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: F:BaseLib.Config.UI.NConfigButton.PropertyName._colorShader

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.UI.NConfigOptionRow.AddCustomHoverTip(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a HoverTip based on custom LocStrings. See to use LocStrings based on the setting's property name.
member.param: The LocString entry to use for the title (can be null)
The LocString entry to use for the description

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.UI.NConfigOptionRow.AddHoverTip
member.summary:
Adds a HoverTip to this row, using predefined entries in the localization file.
Localization is required; the game's HoverTip class doesn't let you use fixed strings. The names used are typically: YOURMOD-PROPERTY_NAME.hover.title (optional, if missing, no title will be shown)
YOURMOD-PROPERTY_NAME.hover.desc (required)

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.UI.NConfigOptionRow.RemoveHoverTip
member.summary: Removes a hover tip, if present.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Config.UI.NConfigSlider.SetRange(System.Double,System.Double,System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary:
Updates the slider's limits (and optionally step) atomically, ensuring no issues where e.g. min > max occur, even briefly.
The current value is clamped to fit inside [min, max].
Use instead if your values are known at compile time.
member.exception: If min is greater than or equal to max

member.name: M:BaseLib.Extensions.ControlExtensions.DrawDebug(Godot.Control)
M:BaseLib.Extensions.ControlExtensions.AddThemeFontSizeOverrideAll(Godot.Control,System.Int32)
member.summary: Calls AddThemeFontSizeOverride() for all font types: font_size, {normal,bold,italics,bold_italics,mono}_font_size.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Extensions.DynamicVarExtensions.WithTooltip(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Localization.DynamicVars.DynamicVar,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a tooltip to a card this DynamicVar is attached to. By default will pull from the static_hover_tips table. The key will be the variable's name, with a mod prefix added, in the form of "PREFIX-NAME" (all capitalized).

member.name: M:BaseLib.Extensions.HarmonyExtensions.PatchAsyncMoveNext(HarmonyLib.Harmony,System.Reflection.MethodInfo,HarmonyLib.HarmonyMethod,HarmonyLib.HarmonyMethod,HarmonyLib.HarmonyMethod,HarmonyLib.HarmonyMethod)
member.summary: Not necessary! Use `MethodType.Async` in your HarmonyPatch annotation.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Extensions.TypeExtensions.FindStateMachineField(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Finds a field in a generated state machine class for an async method, given the state machine type and the name of the original field.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Patches.Content.CustomEnumAttribute
member.summary: Marks a field as intended to contain a new generated enum value. Certain types of enums have additional functionality. Currently: CardKeyword, PileType
member.param: This is relevant only if the field is intended to be a keyword. If not supplied, field name will be used.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Patches.Content.CustomEnumAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Marks a field as intended to contain a new generated enum value. Certain types of enums have additional functionality. Currently: CardKeyword, PileType
member.param: This is relevant only if the field is intended to be a keyword. If not supplied, field name will be used.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Patches.Content.KeywordPropertiesAttribute
member.summary: Marks a CardKeyword field as having additional keyword properties. This is not required to create a keyword, only if you want to use the additional features added by this.
member.param: The keyword's localized title will automatically be added to the specified position in the card's description for cards with the keyword.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Patches.Content.KeywordPropertiesAttribute.#ctor(BaseLib.Patches.Content.AutoKeywordPosition)
member.summary: Marks a CardKeyword field as having additional keyword properties. This is not required to create a keyword, only if you want to use the additional features added by this.
member.param: The keyword's localized title will automatically be added to the specified position in the card's description for cards with the keyword.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Patches.Content.GenEnumValues
member.summary: Generates and assigns values to fields marked with the CustomEnum attribute, and also performs some special logic for certain types of enums, like keywords and piletypes.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Patches.Features.ModInterop.CheckParamMatch(System.Reflection.ParameterInfo[],System.Type[])
member.summary: Check if checkParams can be passed as targetParams, with object being treated as a wildcard.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Patches.Features.SelfApplyDebuffPatch
member.summary: If player applies a debuff to self or ally before turn ends (not from curse cards like doubt), the debuff should tick it's duration at enemy's turn ends

member.name: T:BaseLib.Patches.Hooks.ModifyHealAmountPatches
member.summary: IHealAmountModifier.ModifyHealAdditive() -> AbstractModel.ModifyHealAmount() -> IHealAmountModifier.ModifyHealMultiplicative() reserve AbstractModel.ModifyHealAmount() in the process for compatibility

member.name: T:BaseLib.Patches.UI.ICustomUiModel
member.summary: When a model (card, relic, potion?) is attached to its NCard/NRelic etc, it can provide a Control which will be added as a child of the node. This child will automatically be removed when the model is unbound from the node.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Patches.UI.ICustomUiModel.CreateCustomUi(Godot.Control)
member.summary: Set up a control that will be added as a child. This control should not actively track information, only display it. Keep any information in the model, as the control will be recreated whenever the model is reloaded.
member.param: The control that will be added as a child. Add what you want to add as a child of this control.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Patches.UI.NTemporaryUi.MethodName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the methods contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Patches.UI.NTemporaryUi.PropertyName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the properties and fields contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Patches.UI.NTemporaryUi.SignalName
member.summary: Cached StringNames for the signals contained in this class, for fast lookup.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.AncientDialogueUtil.GetDialoguesForKey(System.String,System.String,System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Generates a list of AncientDialogue (conversations) by checking for existing localization with a specified file and key.
member.param: name of table to check for localization

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.AncientDialogueUtil.DialogueExists(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.param: first section of key ending with a '.'
index of conversation

member.name: P:BaseLib.Utils.AncientOption.AllVariants
member.summary: For special options like Orobas SeaGlass with multiple variants.

member.name: P:BaseLib.Utils.AncientOption`1.ModelPrep
member.summary: Set this if relic needs to set up data based on current run state, eg. Sea Glass choosing a random other character.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions
member.summary: Contains commonly used actions in cards as shortcuts that handle the most common ways these commands are used.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions.CardAttack(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Cards.CardPlay,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Performs an attack using a card's DamageVar or CalculatedDamageVar on the card play's target.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions.CardAttack(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Creatures.Creature,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Performs an attack using a card's DamageVar or CalculatedDamageVar on a specified target.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions.CardAttack(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Creatures.Creature,System.Decimal,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Performs an attacking using a specified amount of damage on a target.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions.CardAttack(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Creatures.Creature,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Localization.DynamicVars.CalculatedDamageVar,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Performs an attacking using aCalculatedDamageVar on a target.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions.CardBlock(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Cards.CardPlay)
member.summary: Gains Block based on the card's BlockVar.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions.CardBlock(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Localization.DynamicVars.BlockVar,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Cards.CardPlay)
member.summary: Gains Block based on the given BlockVar.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions.Draw(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.GameActions.Multiplayer.PlayerChoiceContext)
member.summary: Draws cards based on the card's CardsVar.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions.Apply``1(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Creatures.Creature,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,System.Decimal,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Applies the power specified as the generic parameter to the target.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions.ApplySelf``1(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,System.Decimal,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Applies the power specified as the generic parameter to the card's owner.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions.SelectCards(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Localization.LocString,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.GameActions.Multiplayer.PlayerChoiceContext,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Cards.PileType,System.Int32)
member.summary: Opens a card selection screen where a specific number of cards must be selected and returns the selection result.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions.SelectCards(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Localization.LocString,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.GameActions.Multiplayer.PlayerChoiceContext,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Cards.PileType,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Opens a card selection screen where a range of cards must be selected and returns the selection result.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.CommonActions.SelectSingleCard(MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Models.CardModel,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Localization.LocString,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.GameActions.Multiplayer.PlayerChoiceContext,MegaCrit.Sts2.Core.Entities.Cards.PileType)
member.summary: Opens a card selection screen selecting a single card and returns that single card (or null if no card could be selected).

member.name: T:BaseLib.Utils.GeneratedNodePool
member.summary: Utility class for adding custom poolables to specifically for poolables with a custom generation method rather than using a scene file

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.GodotUtils.CreatureVisualsFromImage(System.String)
member.summary: Creatures an NCreatureVisuals from an image.
member.param: Filepath to an image that can be loaded as a Texture2D.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Utils.ModInterop.ModInteropAttribute
member.summary: Will patch methods, properties and classes in this class to reference methods/properties/fields/classes from another mod, while avoiding a hard dependency. Classes should inherit from InteropClassWrapper. Methods should match the signature of the target method. If a method is static and its target is not, the instance should be the first parameter.
member.param: The mod ID that must be loaded for this interop to be initialized.
Will be used as base type for all members of the class that do not set type themselves.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.ModInterop.ModInteropAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Will patch methods, properties and classes in this class to reference methods/properties/fields/classes from another mod, while avoiding a hard dependency. Classes should inherit from InteropClassWrapper. Methods should match the signature of the target method. If a method is static and its target is not, the instance should be the first parameter.
member.param: The mod ID that must be loaded for this interop to be initialized.
Will be used as base type for all members of the class that do not set type themselves.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Utils.ModInterop.InteropTargetAttribute
member.summary: Type must be provided in this attribute or in the containing class's ModInteropAttribute. If name is not provided, the name of the attached member will be used. If targeting a class, Type and Name function identically.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Utils.NodeFactories.NodeFactory`1
member.summary: Factory for producing instances of scene scripts that are normally inaccessible in Godot editor when modding. Will convert a given scene and nodes within the scene into valid types for target scene if it is possible to do so.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.NodeFactories.NodeFactory`1.CreateBareFromResource(System.Object)
member.summary: Create a root node, using resource in node creation. The root node's name is recommended to be set based on the given resource. This root node will them be passed to ConvertScene.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.NodeFactories.NodeFactory`1.ConvertScene(`0,Godot.Node)
member.summary: Convert the root node. If there are additional properties to copy from the root node, that should be done here.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.NodeFactories.NodeFactory`1.ConvertNodeType(Godot.Node,System.Type)
member.summary: This method should convert the given node into the target type, or call the base method if unsupported. The given node should either be freed or incorporated as a child of the generated node.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.NodeFactories.NodeFactory`1.GenerateNode(Godot.Node,BaseLib.Utils.NodeFactories.NodeFactory.INodeInfo)
member.summary: Generate a new instance of the specified node type as a child of target based on the INodeInfo given. This method is used called when a named node is not found in the provided scene, which will be most named nodes if a scene is built from a resource. Optional nodes may be ignored. Required nodes that are unsupported should throw an exception.

member.name: F:BaseLib.Utils.NodeFactories.NodeFactory._namedNodes
member.summary: Nodes that will be looked for in the generated type. Not all of these are necessarily required.

member.name: F:BaseLib.Utils.NodeFactories.NodeFactory.FlexibleStructure
member.summary: If true, then will simply add entire root node of a scene as child of a new instance of target scene type. Otherwise, will need to replace root node.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.OptionPools.#ctor(BaseLib.Utils.WeightedList{BaseLib.Utils.AncientOption},BaseLib.Utils.WeightedList{BaseLib.Utils.AncientOption},BaseLib.Utils.WeightedList{BaseLib.Utils.AncientOption})
member.summary: Constructor for an ancient's options that uses a separate pool for each option.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.OptionPools.#ctor(BaseLib.Utils.WeightedList{BaseLib.Utils.AncientOption},BaseLib.Utils.WeightedList{BaseLib.Utils.AncientOption})
member.summary: Constructor for an ancient's options that uses one pool for its first two options and a second pool for its third option.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.OptionPools.#ctor(BaseLib.Utils.WeightedList{BaseLib.Utils.AncientOption})
member.summary: Constructor for an ancient's options using one pool for all its options.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Utils.Patching.InstructionMatcher
member.summary: Matches a consecutive list of instructions, requiring a matching opcode and operand. If the operand to check for is null, it will be ignored and only the opcode will need to match.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.Patching.InstructionMatcher.#ctor
member.summary: Matches a consecutive list of instructions, requiring a matching opcode and operand. If the operand to check for is null, it will be ignored and only the opcode will need to match.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.Patching.InstructionPatcher.Match(BaseLib.Utils.Patching.IMatcher[])
member.summary: Iterates over given matchers and attempts to match each in order. After matching is complete, position is on the code instruction following the last match. If a match is not found, an exception will be thrown.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.Patching.InstructionPatcher.Match(System.Action{BaseLib.Utils.Patching.IMatcher[]},BaseLib.Utils.Patching.IMatcher[])
member.summary: Iterates over given matchers and attempts to match each in order. After matching is complete, position is on the code instruction following the last match. If a match is not found, onFailMatch is called. By default, this will throw an exception.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.Patching.InstructionPatcher.Step(System.Int32)
member.summary: Adjust current position in code instructions. Should only be called after is called at least once. Avoid doing large steps into unmatched code, as this may result in issues if the code you are patching has already been modified.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.Patching.InstructionPatcher.GetLabels(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Reflection.Emit.Label}@)
member.summary: Gets all labels attached to the current instruction.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.Patching.InstructionPatcher.GetOperandLabel(System.Reflection.Emit.Label@)
member.summary: Gets a label used as the operand of the current instruction.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.Patching.InstructionPatcher.ReplaceLastMatch(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HarmonyLib.CodeInstruction})
member.summary: Replaces a match of CodeInstructions. Note that if this removes a labeled instruction this can cause issues. Preserving labels must be done manually.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.Patching.InstructionPatcher.Insert(HarmonyLib.CodeInstruction)
member.summary: Inserts a single CodeInstruction before the current instruction.

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.Patching.InstructionPatcher.Insert(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HarmonyLib.CodeInstruction})
member.summary: Inserts a sequence of CodeInstructions before the current instruction (after the last match).

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.Patching.InstructionPatcher.InsertCopy(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Inserts a copy of existing CodeInstructions determined by offset. Labels and blocks are not maintained, only opcodes and operands.

member.name: T:BaseLib.Utils.Patching.OpCodeValues
member.summary: Copied from System.Reflection.Emit.OpCodes

member.name: M:BaseLib.Utils.ShaderUtils.GenerateHsv(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Convenience method to quickly generate a ShaderMaterial using the included hsv shader

member.name: T:BaseLib.Utils.SpireField`2
member.summary: A basic wrapper around for convenience. While this can be used to store value types, they will be boxed and thus is somewhat inefficient.
